name: Semantria API
description: Text Analytics API with sentiment analysis, categorization, and named entity extraction. Semantria is a SaaS text analytics service from Lexalytics that provides natural language processing capabilities including sentiment analysis, entity recognition, theme extraction, categorization, and more.
